messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {
    "action_boundary": "May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?",
    "allow_rule_assessment": "No exact match; sources show identical M-4/R4 already paid.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "MS-VAN-076 lists M-4/R4 paid by PRIOR-VAN-076; INV-VAN-076 lacks distinguishing fields.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "No distinction on milestone ID, release, or status per STD-VAN-076-P.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Current source boundary open; no credit/reversal evidence."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "MS-VAN-076",
    "PRIOR-VAN-076",
    "INV-VAN-076"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "milestone ID match",
    "release number match",
    "amount/vendor match"
  ],
  "final_answer": "Sources map the action boundary to an open defect: INV-VAN-076 bills the same M-4/R4 already paid per PRIOR-VAN-076 and MS-VAN-076. Policy STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction on ID, release, and status. No such evidence exists. Action may not proceed. Escalate for resolution of the duplicate invoice boundary.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "No distinguishing status in INV-VAN-076"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?

context.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
context.anomaly_observed: The invoice matches a prior payment on vendor and amount, but may represent a separate milestone/release.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-VAN-076 bills Vanta Field Services USD 42800 for milestone M-4 release R4.
Prior invoice PRIOR-VAN-076 paid Vanta Field Services USD 42800 for milestone M-4 release R4.
Milestone register MS-VAN-076 lists M-4/R4 as a single billable release already paid by PRIOR-VAN-076.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Duplicate-looking milestone invoice is complete only when milestone ID, release number, vendor, amount, and credit/reversal status distinguish it from the prior paid invoice.
